name: CMI-Mem: Toward Generalizable Long-Term Memory Management via CMI-Augmented Reinforcement Learning
summary: arXiv:2607.20553v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Memory Manager models are pivotal in agent systems. Existing methods rely predominantly on LLM-judged synthetic question-answer (QA) pairs, making me...
description: arXiv:2607.20553v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Memory Manager models are pivotal in agent systems. Existing methods rely predominantly on LLM-judged synthetic question-answer (QA) pairs, making memory valuation dependent on sampled queries and the downstream reader. To address this limitation, we propose \textbf{CMI-Mem}, a reinforcement learning(RL)-based lightweight memory manager model with...
author: Yubo Wang, Qiuyu Zhao, Zenghui Sun, Shichao Dong, Jinsong Lan, Xiaoyong Zhu, Haoyang Li, Bo Zheng, Lei Chen
